---
title: 'Laboratorio 9: redes neuronales'
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r carga de datos}
load("listings_modificado.RData")
```

```{r paquetes}
library(caret)
library(nnet)
```

```{r conjuntos train y test}
set.seed(123)

muestra_idx <- sample(1:nrow(listings), size = 10000)
muestra <- listings[muestra_idx, ]

n <- nrow(muestra)
train_idx <- sample(1:n, size = 0.7 * n)

train <- muestra[train_idx, ]
test <- muestra[-train_idx, ]
```


```{r variable respuesta}
cuts <- quantile(train$price, probs = c(0.33, 0.66), na.rm = TRUE)

train$price_cat <- cut(train$price,
                       breaks = c(-Inf, cuts[1], cuts[2], Inf),
                       labels = c("Economica", "Intermedia", "Cara"))

test$price_cat <- cut(test$price,
                      breaks = c(-Inf, cuts[1], cuts[2], Inf),
                      labels = c("Economica", "Intermedia", "Cara"))

train$price_cat <- as.factor(train$price_cat)
test$price_cat  <- as.factor(test$price_cat)
```

### Redes neuronales

```{r modelo 1}
set.seed(123)

modelo_nn1 <- nnet(
  price_cat ~ accommodates + bathrooms_num + bedrooms + beds +
    host_response_rate + host_acceptance_rate +
    calculated_host_listings_count + number_of_reviews +
    reviews_per_month + review_scores_rating +
    minimum_nights + availability_365 +
    room_type + host_is_superhost + instant_bookable + bathroom_type,
  data = train,
  size = 4,        # numero de neuronas ocultas
  decay = 5e-4,    # decay
  maxit = 200,
  trace = FALSE
)

# Predicción modelo 1
pred_nn1 <- predict(modelo_nn1, newdata = test, type = "class")
pred_nn1 <- factor(pred_nn1, levels = levels(test$price_cat))
matriz_nn1 <- confusionMatrix(pred_nn1, test$price_cat)
matriz_nn1
```

```{r modelo 2}
set.seed(123)

modelo_nn2 <- nnet(
  price_cat ~ accommodates + bathrooms_num + bedrooms + beds +
    host_response_rate + host_acceptance_rate +
    calculated_host_listings_count + number_of_reviews +
    reviews_per_month + review_scores_rating +
    minimum_nights + availability_365 +
    room_type + host_is_superhost + instant_bookable + bathroom_type,
  data = train,
  size = 10,        # número de neuronas ocultas
  decay = 1e-4,    # menos decay que el modelo 1
  maxit = 700,     # más iteraciones que el modelo 1
  trace = FALSE
)

# Predicción modelo 2
pred_nn2 <- predict(modelo_nn2, newdata = test, type = "class")
pred_nn2 <- factor(pred_nn2, levels = levels(test$price_cat))
matriz_nn2 <- confusionMatrix(pred_nn2, test$price_cat)
matriz_nn2
```


```{r inciso 6 - comparacion modelos clasificacion}
# Tabla comparativa de los dos modelos de clasificación
comparacion_clf <- data.frame(
  Modelo = c(
    "Modelo 1 (size=4, decay=5e-4, maxit=200, activacion=logistica)",
    "Modelo 2 (size=10, decay=1e-4, maxit=700, activacion=logistica)"
  ),
  Accuracy = c(
    round(matriz_nn1$overall["Accuracy"], 4),
    round(matriz_nn2$overall["Accuracy"], 4)
  ),
  Kappa = c(
    round(matriz_nn1$overall["Kappa"], 4),
    round(matriz_nn2$overall["Kappa"], 4)
  )
)
print(comparacion_clf)

# Tiempo de predicción de cada modelo
start1 <- proc.time()
invisible(predict(modelo_nn1, newdata = test, type = "class"))
tiempo_nn1 <- (proc.time() - start1)["elapsed"]

start2 <- proc.time()
invisible(predict(modelo_nn2, newdata = test, type = "class"))
tiempo_nn2 <- (proc.time() - start2)["elapsed"]

cat(sprintf("\nTiempo de predicción Modelo 1: %.4f s\n", tiempo_nn1))
cat(sprintf("Tiempo de predicción Modelo 2: %.4f s\n", tiempo_nn2))

# Análisis de errores por clase
cat("\nErrores Modelo 1 (filas=predicho, columnas=real):\n")
print(matriz_nn1$table)
cat("\nErrores Modelo 2 (filas=predicho, columnas=real):\n")
print(matriz_nn2$table)

# Clase con más errores en cada modelo
errores_nn1 <- rowSums(matriz_nn1$table) - diag(matriz_nn1$table)
errores_nn2 <- rowSums(matriz_nn2$table) - diag(matriz_nn2$table)
cat("\nClase con más errores - Modelo 1:", names(which.max(errores_nn1)), "\n")
cat("Clase con más errores - Modelo 2:", names(which.max(errores_nn2)), "\n")
```

```{r inciso 7 - sobreajuste clasificacion}
library(ggplot2)
set.seed(123)

tamanos_clf <- floor(seq(500, nrow(train), length.out = 6))
acc_train_clf <- numeric(length(tamanos_clf))
acc_test_clf  <- numeric(length(tamanos_clf))

for (i in seq_along(tamanos_clf)) {
  idx <- sample(1:nrow(train), tamanos_clf[i])
  train_sub <- train[idx, ]

  modelo_tmp_clf <- nnet(
    price_cat ~ accommodates + bathrooms_num + bedrooms + beds +
      host_response_rate + host_acceptance_rate +
      calculated_host_listings_count + number_of_reviews +
      reviews_per_month + review_scores_rating +
      minimum_nights + availability_365 +
      room_type + host_is_superhost + instant_bookable + bathroom_type,
    data = train_sub,
    size = 4, decay = 5e-4, maxit = 200, trace = FALSE
  )

  pred_tr_clf <- predict(modelo_tmp_clf, newdata = train_sub, type = "class")
  pred_ts_clf <- predict(modelo_tmp_clf, newdata = test,      type = "class")

  acc_train_clf[i] <- mean(pred_tr_clf == as.character(train_sub$price_cat))
  acc_test_clf[i]  <- mean(pred_ts_clf == as.character(test$price_cat))
}

curva_clf <- data.frame(
  Tamano   = rep(tamanos_clf, 2),
  Accuracy = c(acc_train_clf, acc_test_clf),
  Conjunto = rep(c("Entrenamiento", "Validación"), each = length(tamanos_clf))
)

ggplot(curva_clf, aes(x = Tamano, y = Accuracy, color = Conjunto)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Curva de aprendizaje – Clasificación (Modelo 1, size=4)",
       x = "Volumen de datos de entrenamiento",
       y = "Exactitud (Accuracy)")
```

```{r inciso 8}

set.seed(123)


control <- trainControl(method = "cv", number = 5)


grid <- expand.grid(size = c(2, 4, 6),
                    decay = c(1e-4, 5e-4, 1e-3))


modelo_tuneado <- train(
  price_cat ~ accommodates + bathrooms_num + bedrooms + beds +
    host_response_rate + host_acceptance_rate +
    calculated_host_listings_count + number_of_reviews +
    reviews_per_month + review_scores_rating +
    minimum_nights + availability_365 +
    room_type + host_is_superhost + instant_bookable + bathroom_type,
  data = train,
  method = "nnet",
  tuneGrid = grid,
  trControl = control,
  maxit = 200,
  trace = FALSE
)


print(modelo_tuneado$bestTune)


pred_tuneado <- predict(modelo_tuneado, newdata = test)
matriz_tuneada <- confusionMatrix(pred_tuneado, test$price_cat)
matriz_tuneada
```

### Modelos de Regresión

```{r inciso 9 - variable respuesta regresion}
formula_reg <- price ~ accommodates + bathrooms_num + bedrooms + beds +
  host_response_rate + host_acceptance_rate +
  calculated_host_listings_count + number_of_reviews +
  reviews_per_month + review_scores_rating +
  minimum_nights + availability_365 +
  room_type + host_is_superhost + instant_bookable + bathroom_type

```

``` {r inciso 10 - modelos de regresion}
set.seed(123)
modelo_reg1 <- nnet(
  formula_reg,
  data = train,
  size = 5,
  decay = 0.01,
  linout = TRUE, 
  maxit = 200,
  trace = FALSE
)

# predicción del modelo 1
pred_reg1 <- predict(modelo_reg1, newdata = test)


set.seed(123)
modelo_reg2 <- nnet(
  formula_reg,
  data = train,
  size = 12,
  decay = 0.001,
  linout = TRUE,
  maxit = 500,
  trace = FALSE
)

# predicción del modelo 2
pred_reg2 <- predict(modelo_reg2, newdata = test)
```

```{r inciso 11 - comparación de  modelos regresión}
# métricas de error para el modelo 1
metricas_reg1 <- postResample(pred = pred_reg1, obs = test$price)
print("Métricas del modelo de regresión 1:")
print(metricas_reg1)

# métricas de error para el modelo 2
metricas_reg2 <- postResample(pred = pred_reg2, obs = test$price)
print("Métricas del modelo de regresión 2:")
print(metricas_reg2)
```

``` {r inciso 12 - comparación con modelo de clasificación}
library(ggplot2)
set.seed(123)

tamanos <- floor(seq(1000, nrow(train), length.out = 5))
train_rmse <- numeric(length(tamanos))
test_rmse <- numeric(length(tamanos))

# bucle para entrenar el modelo con diferentes cantidades de datos
for(i in seq_along(tamanos)) {
  idx <- sample(1:nrow(train), tamanos[i])
  train_subset <- train[idx, ]
  

  modelo_temp <- nnet(
    formula_reg, 
    data = train_subset, 
    size = 5, 
    decay = 0.01, 
    linout = TRUE, 
    maxit = 200, 
    trace = FALSE
  )
  
  # predicciones temporales
  pred_train_temp <- predict(modelo_temp, newdata = train_subset)
  pred_test_temp <- predict(modelo_temp, newdata = test)
  
  
  train_rmse[i] <- RMSE(pred_train_temp, train_subset$price)
  test_rmse[i] <- RMSE(pred_test_temp, test$price)
}


resultados_curva <- data.frame(
  Tamano = rep(tamanos, 2),
  RMSE = c(train_rmse, test_rmse),
  Conjunto = rep(c("Entrenamiento", "Validacion"), each = length(tamanos))
)


ggplot(resultados_curva, aes(x = Tamano, y = RMSE, color = Conjunto)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Evolución del error predictivo",
       subtitle = "Análisis de curva de aprendizaje",
       x = "Volumen de datos de entrenamiento",
       y = "Error cuadrático medio (RMSE)")
```

```{r inciso 13 - tunear modelo regresion}
set.seed(123)

control_reg <- trainControl(method = "cv", number = 5)

grid_reg <- expand.grid(
  size  = c(5, 10, 15),
  decay = c(0.001, 0.01, 0.1)
)

modelo_reg_tuneado <- train(
  price ~ accommodates + bathrooms_num + bedrooms + beds +
    host_response_rate + host_acceptance_rate +
    calculated_host_listings_count + number_of_reviews +
    reviews_per_month + review_scores_rating +
    minimum_nights + availability_365 +
    room_type + host_is_superhost + instant_bookable + bathroom_type,
  data      = train,
  method    = "nnet",
  linout    = TRUE,
  tuneGrid  = grid_reg,
  trControl = control_reg,
  maxit     = 500,
  trace     = FALSE
)

print(modelo_reg_tuneado$bestTune)

pred_reg_tuneado     <- predict(modelo_reg_tuneado, newdata = test)
metricas_reg_tuneado <- postResample(pred = pred_reg_tuneado, obs = test$price)
cat("Métricas del modelo de regresión tuneado (RNA):\n")
print(metricas_reg_tuneado)
```

### Comparación con algoritmos de entregas anteriores

```{r inciso 14-16 - comparacion algoritmos anteriores}
# Métricas RNA (calculadas en esta entrega)
rmse_rna <- metricas_reg_tuneado["RMSE"]
r2_rna   <- metricas_reg_tuneado["Rsquared"]
acc_rna  <- matriz_tuneada$overall["Accuracy"]

# ── Tabla comparativa de REGRESIÓN (predecir precio) ─────────────────────────
# Resultados de entregas anteriores (mismas condiciones: seed=123, 70/30, 10k obs)
tabla_regresion <- data.frame(
  Algoritmo = c(
    "Naive Bayes (Lab 5)",
    "Lasso – Reg. Lineal (Lab 3)",
    "SVM Radial (Lab 8)",
    "Árbol de Regresión prof=6 (Lab 4)",
    "KNN k=7 (Lab 6)",
    "Random Forest 100 árboles (Lab 4)",
    "RNA tuneada (Lab 9)"
  ),
  RMSE = c(9457.00, 4168.63, 3077.35, 2478.74, 2456.05, 2410.27, round(rmse_rna, 2)),
  R2   = c(0.09,    0.030,   0.4179,  0.665,   0.619,   0.691,   round(r2_rna,   4))
)
cat("=== Comparación de modelos de REGRESIÓN (menor RMSE = mejor) ===\n")
print(tabla_regresion[order(tabla_regresion$RMSE), ])

# ── Tabla comparativa de CLASIFICACIÓN (categoría de precio 3 clases) ────────
# Resultados de entregas anteriores (mismas condiciones)
tabla_clasificacion <- data.frame(
  Algoritmo = c(
    "Árbol base (Lab 4)",
    "Naive Bayes (Lab 5)",
    "Reg. Logística multinomial (Lab 7)",
    "KNN k=7 (Lab 6)",
    "Árbol prof=9 (Lab 4)",
    "SVM Polinomial (Lab 8)",
    "Random Forest 100 árboles (Lab 4)",
    "RNA tuneada (Lab 9)"
  ),
  Accuracy = c(0.5687, 0.5700, 0.6050, 0.6217, 0.6286, 0.6463, 0.6697,
               round(acc_rna, 4)),
  Kappa    = c(0.3527, NA,     0.4071, 0.4321, 0.4427, 0.4692, 0.5046,
               round(matriz_tuneada$overall["Kappa"], 4))
)
cat("\n=== Comparación de modelos de CLASIFICACIÓN (mayor Accuracy = mejor) ===\n")
print(tabla_clasificacion[order(tabla_clasificacion$Accuracy), ])

# ── Gráfico comparativo de regresión ─────────────────────────────────────────
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(tabla_regresion, aes(x = reorder(Algoritmo, RMSE), y = RMSE, fill = Algoritmo)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = "Comparación de RMSE – Modelos de Regresión",
       x = NULL, y = "RMSE (menor es mejor)")

# ── Gráfico comparativo de clasificación ─────────────────────────────────────
ggplot(tabla_clasificacion, aes(x = reorder(Algoritmo, Accuracy), y = Accuracy, fill = Algoritmo)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = "Comparación de Accuracy – Modelos de Clasificación",
       x = NULL, y = "Accuracy (mayor es mejor)")
```

### Análisis de sobreajuste global y conclusiones

```{r inciso 17-18 - conclusiones y sobreajuste}
# Diferencia entre accuracy de entrenamiento y prueba para cada modelo de clasificación
acc_train_final_clf <- mean(
  predict(modelo_nn1, newdata = train, type = "class") == as.character(train$price_cat)
)
acc_test_final_clf  <- matriz_nn1$overall["Accuracy"]

acc_train_final_nn2 <- mean(
  predict(modelo_nn2, newdata = train, type = "class") == as.character(train$price_cat)
)
acc_test_final_nn2  <- matriz_nn2$overall["Accuracy"]

# Diferencia entre RMSE de entrenamiento y prueba para modelos de regresión
rmse_train_reg1 <- RMSE(predict(modelo_reg1, newdata = train), train$price)
rmse_test_reg1  <- metricas_reg1["RMSE"]

rmse_train_reg2 <- RMSE(predict(modelo_reg2, newdata = train), train$price)
rmse_test_reg2  <- metricas_reg2["RMSE"]

# Tabla de sobreajuste
tabla_sobreajuste <- data.frame(
  Modelo = c(
    "Clasificación – RNA Modelo 1 (size=4)",
    "Clasificación – RNA Modelo 2 (size=10)",
    "Regresión – RNA Modelo 1 (size=5)",
    "Regresión – RNA Modelo 2 (size=12)"
  ),
  Metrica_Train = c(
    round(acc_train_final_clf,  4),
    round(acc_train_final_nn2,  4),
    round(rmse_train_reg1,      2),
    round(rmse_train_reg2,      2)
  ),
  Metrica_Test = c(
    round(acc_test_final_clf,   4),
    round(acc_test_final_nn2,   4),
    round(rmse_test_reg1,       2),
    round(rmse_test_reg2,       2)
  ),
  Diferencia = c(
    round(acc_train_final_clf - acc_test_final_clf,  4),
    round(acc_train_final_nn2 - acc_test_final_nn2,  4),
    round(rmse_test_reg1      - rmse_train_reg1,     2),
    round(rmse_test_reg2      - rmse_train_reg2,     2)
  ),
  Metrica = c("Accuracy (↑ mejor)", "Accuracy (↑ mejor)",
               "RMSE (↓ mejor)",    "RMSE (↓ mejor)")
)

cat("=== Análisis de sobreajuste por modelo ===\n")
print(tabla_sobreajuste)
cat("\nInterpretación: diferencia Train vs Test\n")
cat("  Clasificación – diferencia grande en Accuracy indica sobreajuste.\n")
cat("  Regresión     – RMSE_test >> RMSE_train indica sobreajuste.\n")
```
